query:
SELECT dp.driver_code, dp.name, dcl.status, dcl.invited_at, dcl.responded_at, c.name as company_name, c.company_code
FROM driver_profiles dp
LEFT JOIN driver_company_links dcl ON dcl.driver_profile_id = dp.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = dcl.company_id
WHERE dp.driver_code = 'D-11903';
